name: companieswise
description: Verified UK company lookup & validation for AI agents — Companies House data, snapshot or live.
long_description: Look up UK companies by their Companies House number, validate a number's format, or find a company number by name — from official Companies House data, never a guess. By default it uses a bundled sample (or a locally-cached monthly snapshot); add a free Companies House API key below to switch to real-time live data, including dissolved companies. Your key is sent only to the official Companies House API.

tools.name: lookup_company
tools.description: Get a UK company's official registered details by its Companies House number.

tools.name: validate_company_number
tools.description: Check a UK company number's format and identify its register/type.

tools.name: search_company
tools.description: Find a UK company's number from its name (reverse lookup).

ch_api_key.title: Companies House API key (optional)
ch_api_key.description: Add a free Companies House API key for real-time live data (incl. dissolved companies). Leave blank to use the bundled snapshot. Get one at developer.company-information.service.gov.uk.
